name: MOONLIGHT HYDROFACIAL
shortDescription: 10-in-1 hydrofacial device with 10 treatment heads. Hydrodermabrasion, ultrasound, lifting, hot-cold hammer, spray head.
description:
The Moonlight Hydrofacial is a 10-in-1 multifunctional facial treatment device that combines advanced technologies to provide a comprehensive solution for cleansing, hydrating, firming and rejuvenating facial skin.

The device features 10 professional treatment heads covering every treatment need from deep cleansing to lifting and active ingredient delivery.

Clinically proven results: 15.51% increase in skin hydration, 30.35% reduction in sebum content, 20.42% improvement in skin elasticity.
metaTitle: Moonlight Hydrofacial | 10-in-1 Multifunctional Facial Treatment Device
metaDescription: Moonlight Hydrofacial 10-in-1: 10 treatment heads, deep cleansing, hydration, lifting, skin rejuvenation. 2-year warranty.

videoDescription.headline: The Moonlight Hydrofacial – premium skincare with 10 treatment heads
paragraphs: The Moonlight Hydrofacial features 10 professional treatment heads that enable a complete facial treatment protocol.
The combination of advanced technologies – deep cleansing, hydration, lifting, skin firming – delivers immediately visible results.
Clinically proven results: 15.51% increase in hydration, 30.35% reduction in sebum content, 20.42% improvement in elasticity.

featureRows.headline: Why do beauticians choose the Moonlight Hydrofacial?
featureRows.subtitle: 10 treatment heads, clinically proven results

features.title: 10 professional treatment heads in a single device
features.description:
Bubble pen – hydrodermabrasion deep cleansing
Ice head – cooling, irritation reduction
Ultrasound head (face + eye area)
Magic ball – microcurrent stimulation
Suction pen – vacuum pore cleansing
Lifting head – microstimulation
Facial ultrasound – deep ultrasound
Line head – RF/EMS tone improvement
Product spray – misting head
Ultrasonic spatula – cleansing peeling

features.title: Clinically proven results
features.description:
The Moonlight Hydrofacial delivers measurable results based on manufacturer clinical data:
12.86% reduction in skin redness
30.35% reduction in sebum content
15.51% increase in hydration
16.37% brighter skin tone
20.42% improvement in elasticity

features.title: Deep cleansing and hydration
features.description: The combination of bubble pen and suction pen deeply cleanses pores, removing blackheads and impurities. The ultrasound and product spray heads provide intensive hydration and active ingredient delivery.

features.title: Lifting and skin firming
features.description: The lifting head uses microstimulation to elevate contours, the line head improves tone with RF/EMS, while the magic ball soothes and stimulates with microcurrent. The ice head completes the treatment with a cooling, irritation-reducing effect.

training.headline: Device operator training – official adult education programme
training.intro: Professional device operator training is available for the Moonlight Hydrofacial, provided within the framework of officially registered adult education.
items: Operating principles of the Moonlight Hydrofacial and use of all 10 treatment heads
Treatment protocols for different skin types and concerns
Deep cleansing, lifting and hydration techniques
Skin analysis basics and personalised treatment planning
closingParagraphs: You are welcome to bring a model to the training so you can master treatment techniques in a real-world setting.
Upon completion, we issue an official certificate confirming competence in the professional use of the Moonlight Hydrofacial device.

expertQuote.quote: The Moonlight Hydrofacial with 10 treatment heads and clinically proven results represents outstanding value. A complete facial treatment with a single device.
expertQuote.author: László Horváth

faq.question: What treatment heads are included with the Moonlight Hydrofacial?
faq.answer: The device comes with 10 treatment heads: bubble pen (hydrodermabrasion), ice head (cooling), ultrasound head (face + eye area), magic ball (microcurrent), suction pen (vacuum cleansing), lifting head, facial ultrasound, line head (RF/EMS), product spray and ultrasonic spatula.

faq.question: What clinically proven results can I expect?
faq.answer: Based on manufacturer clinical data: 12.86% reduction in skin redness, 30.35% reduction in sebum content, 15.51% increase in hydration, 16.37% brighter skin tone and 20.42% improvement in elasticity.

faq.question: Which skin types is it recommended for?
faq.answer: The Moonlight Hydrofacial is ideal for oily, acne-prone and blackhead-prone skin, dehydrated and dull facial skin, mature and tone-deficient skin, as well as skin rejuvenation and anti-aging treatment support.

faq.question: How quickly does the Moonlight Hydrofacial pay for itself?
faq.answer: On average within 2-3 months, with 2-4 clients per day. A hydrofacial treatment typically costs between 15,000-25,000 Ft. Use our ROI calculator for precise calculations!

faq.question: What training comes with the device?
faq.answer: Official adult education training worth 69,990 Ft, FREE with device purchase. The training covers all 10 treatment heads, treatment protocols and practical treatments.

faq.question: What consumables are needed?
faq.answer: Hydrodermabrasion treatments require special serums and solutions. We provide these at preferential prices for our clients, for example from the HydraLiquid product range.

faq.question: Can I view the device before purchasing?
faq.answer: Yes! You can view and try the Moonlight Hydrofacial in person at our showroom (Érd, Budai út 28.) by prior appointment.
